en: TO THE CHOIRMASTER. A PSALM OF DAVID. How long, O LORD? Will you forget me forever? How long will you hide your face from me?
zh: 耶和華啊！你忘記我要到幾時呢？ 要到永遠嗎？ 你掩面不顧我，要到幾時呢？

en: How long must I take counsel in my soul and have sorrow in my heart all the day? How long shall my enemy be exalted over me?
zh: 我心裡籌算不安，內心終日愁苦，要到幾時呢？ 我的仇敵勝過我，要到幾時呢？

en: Consider and answer me, O LORD my God; light up my eyes, lest I sleep the sleep of death,
zh: 耶和華我的 神啊！求你看顧我，應允我； 求你使我的眼睛明亮，免得我沉睡至死；

en: lest my enemy say, "I have prevailed over him," lest my foes rejoice because I am shaken.
zh: 免得我的仇敵說：“我勝過了他”； 免得我跌倒的時候我的敵人就歡呼。

en: But I have trusted in your steadfast love; my heart shall rejoice in your salvation.
zh: 至於我，我倚靠你的慈愛， 我的心必因你的救恩歡呼。

en: I will sing to the LORD, because he has dealt bountifully with me.
zh: 我要歌頌耶和華，因他以厚恩待我。 大衛的詩，交給詩班長。
